Update cacti to 1.1.30

Update cacti to 1.1.30

Committer: please ignore portlint warnings about gettext - cacti has internal gettext support.

No merge-quarterly required as no CVE updates in this release.

Poudriere testport logs for 10.4/11.1 i386/amd64 at:
